results.title: FCCPC denies approving 48 loan apps, rejects 505 lenders’ claim
results.description: The FCCPC has denied reports that it has approved 48 more loan apps, bringing the total licensed digital lenders in Nigeria to 505. The post FCCPC denies approving 48 loan apps, rejects 505 lenders’ claim appeared first on Nairametrics .
